title: Chapter 2260
content:
Chapter 2260: Chapter 1046: Primordial Heaven Blood Sacrifice

Certainly! Here is the translation:

Desolate Heaven Blood Sacrifice Formation opens!

In an instant, from the earth veins, blood gushes forth and the ground trembles.

Surrounding the Qianxue State Boundary, anomalies suddenly appear, the ground fissures, revealing red hues, and evil qi spreads straight towards the sky.

Under the blood-red shroud.

One after another, hidden altars, began to have the will of evil gods descend.

The tributed statues, eyes flowing blood, with wicked smiles at the corners of their mouths, accompanied by terrifying low growls of evil gods.

Lurking in the dark, hordes upon hordes of cult followers, inspired by evil power, grotesque and bizarre, frenzied and crazed, began indiscriminate mass slaughter throughout various locations...

In the deep mountains, on seemingly mundane cliffs, demon nests suddenly open, black winds surge, large numbers of evil cultivators and demon cultivators swarm out, sweeping through the mountains with grotesque laughter, slaughtering every cultivator they encounter...

In some small Immortal Cities, demon cultivators gather crowds, attacking cities and slaughtering, causing rivers of blood.

In villages where loose cultivators reside, evil cultivators emerge, devouring flesh and bones.

Even on the streets, in broad daylight, there are seemingly normal cultivators who suddenly shred human skin, drop disguises, grow fangs, and begin to bite pedestrians...

Additionally, the Taoist Prisons in various state boundaries also begin to riot.

Various evil demons and Sin Cultivators held in the Taoist Prison suddenly have blood-red eyes, empowered by evil force, and break out, engaging in deadly conflicts with Taoist Court cultivators...

Throughout Qianxue, the bloodthirsty slaughter does not cease, the cruel chaos continues.

Blood flows across the land.

Flesh begins to be piled into walls.

On the altars everywhere, one by one, terrified heads of those who died miserably after remaining, are placed up as offerings to the evil gods...

Blood and slaughter gradually stain the sky red.

The cultivators at Qianxue State Boundary all look up to the sky, their expressions horrified.

They witnessed with their own eyes, the emergence of five Heaven Void Dharma Phases, an anomaly covered in golden light.

They also witnessed the opening of the Fifth Grade Mount of Tao Formation, the spectacular scene of the starry sky overturning.

Now, in the blink of an eye, what they see is this Demon Path rampage, blood-red ominous signs.

In a short time, shocking changes occur incessantly, anomalies frequently appear, and everyone feels only terror in their hearts, as if in a horrifying nightmare.

The Qianxue Court Tribunal immediately began operating at full capacity.

From top to bottom, the entire Taoist Court Tribunal, all supervisors, enforcement leaders, and external cultivators, all obey orders, rushing like a tidal wave to various places to suppress the demon scourge.

The court leaders at various state boundaries personally oversee on the front lines, sincere and fearful, not daring to have a moment’s slack.

The blood omen between heaven and earth, demon scourge suddenly arises, this is a millennial unprecedented upheaval.

If handled improperly, these court leaders face, at best, demotion and investigation, imprisonment; at worst, extreme punishment, decapitation.

In an instant, slaughter spreads across various places.

Evil demons slaughter cultivators, Taoist Court Tribunal suppresses evil demons.

Deeper within, even stronger demon-monster power silently surges...

...

All of this, watched from the Sword Observation Tower, seen by Heaven Void Ancestors of various sects and families.

An old familiar, bloody, fearsome name floated in their minds:

Demon Path Great Formation!

Someone is opening the Demon Path Great Formation in Qian State!

The group of ancestors were first incredulous, and then indescribably furious.

At this moment, amidst the peaceful world, there are actually people daring, in the Fifth Grade Qianxue State Boundary, at this cultivation paradise where sects stand and aristocratic families gather, under the noses of a group of Fifth Grade Heaven Void Ancestors, to outrageously open the heavily murderous Demon Path Great Formation?!

Absolutely insane, audaciously reckless.

Yet, after the fury, the group of ancestors felt chilling apprehension deep down.

All of this clearly meticulously planned.

From the Shura battle deduced from the Dao Discussion Heaven Instrument, to the anomaly of the Fifth Grade Large Formation, to the Void Transmission from Xuantian Peak collapsing towards Yanluo Mountain State Boundary...

As well as establishing demon path strongholds everywhere, breeding evil demon cultivators, committing various nefarious acts, secretly paving the foundation for constructing the Demon Path Great Formation.

Taking advantage of the Tao Discussion Assembly, abducting hundreds of talents from various Great Sects in Qianxue.

Taking advantage of the Xuantian Peak anomaly, exploiting the gap, abducting the child from the Shangguan Family with an unusual Life Chart...

These plans absolutely are not accomplished in one day, nor by ordinary cultivators.

Besides those remnants of the Demon Path, there undoubtedly is a person of higher status, stronger capability, profound formation expertise, even capable of tampering with the Fifth Grade Large Formation, aiding the tyrant in secret.

The background of this person, is likely extremely terrifying...

So much so that, although suspicions filled the hearts of all ancestors present, none dared to speak them aloud.

Some things, without solid evidence, cannot be spoken randomly.

They are all ancestors; how could they not understand this principle?

They can only deeply bury this doubt within their hearts.

The current crucial plan is to consider how to quickly destroy the Demon Path Great Formation, quell the demon scourge, this is the most urgent problem.

Once the Demon Path Great Formation gains momentum, the evil disaster spreads, surrounding Qianxue State Boundary, will surely be plunged into devastation.

Even more, each day the Demon Path Great Formation exists, will result in who knows how many needless deaths of cultivators.

This matter is imminent, and the group of ancestors also maintain a steely demeanor.

"The Taoist Court Tribunal has already begun to encircle and eliminate the tumultuous demon cultivators everywhere."

"Each sect has issued orders, letting Sect Elders bring their disciples to various state boundaries, assisting the Taoist Court Tribunal in suppressing the demon scourge."

"All evil demons, completely exterminated, all evil formations, evil artifacts, evil scriptures, all destroyed."

"Especially the Demon Path formations, not a single one can be left."

"The Shangguan Family’s child also has to be rescued... Though it is unknown what the heretical demons captured them for, but this child is evidently crucial to the Demon Path, and even this large formation..."
